mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_review_rules( host_id, challenge_id, rule_text, review_mode ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{challengeId}, #{ruleText}, #{reviewMode} ) ON CONFLICT (challenge_id) DO UPDATE SET host_id = EXCLUDED.host_id, rule_text = EXCLUDED.rule_text, review_mode = EXCLUDED.review_mode, active = true, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, host_id, challenge_id, rule_text, review_mode, active, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_review_rules WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND active = true
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_review_rules SET review_mode = #{reviewMode}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND active = true
